title: Electronica Eltec
description: Website redesign, wireframes, brand guidelines, and product catalog for Electronica Eltec.

process.challenge: The existing website was hard to navigate and didn't reflect the quality of their products. They also lacked a consistent visual identity system.
process.approach: I audited the current site, redefined the information architecture, designed wireframes, and built the new visual system — plus a product catalog and brand guidelines.
process.results: New website with improved usability, refreshed visual identity, and a professional product catalog.
